title: Fix Registration Step 2: Auto-trigger Internet Identity & Redirect to Home After Registration

requirements.text: In RegisterPage.tsx, when the user reaches Step 2 (Authenticate), automatically trigger the Internet Identity login popup via `useInternetIdentity` hook without requiring any manual button click. Use a `useEffect` that fires when the step becomes 2 to call the login function immediately.

quotes: AUTOMATICALLY TRIGGER HO JAYE MANUAALLY Internet Identity YE WALA OPTION ME

acceptanceCriteria: When user completes Step 1 and proceeds to Step 2, the Internet Identity popup opens automatically without any button click
No manual 'Connect with Internet Identity' button interaction is required to trigger the popup
The useEffect dependency correctly watches for step === 2 transition

requirements.text: Fix the 'Connecting...' stuck loading state bug on Step 2 of RegisterPage.tsx. The button must not remain permanently in a loading/spinning state. Reset the connecting state if the Internet Identity login is cancelled, fails, or times out, and re-enable the button so the user can retry.

quotes: 'Connecting...' button stuck in loading state on Step 2 of registration - Internet Identity popup not opening

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Connecting...' spinner does not remain stuck indefinitely
If Internet Identity login is cancelled or fails, the button resets to a clickable retry state
No permanent loading state is shown after a failed or cancelled authentication attempt

requirements.text: After successful registration completion (Step 3 - Done) in RegisterPage.tsx, redirect the user to the Home Page ('/') using the router's navigate function instead of staying on the registration page or going to the dashboard.

quotes: Registration complete hone ke baad (Step 3 - Done) user ko kahan bheja jaaye — HOME PAGE ME BHEJA JAYE

acceptanceCriteria: After registration is fully completed (Step 3 reached and backend registration confirmed), the user is automatically redirected to '/' (Home Page)
The redirect happens without requiring any additional user interaction after Step 3

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts — use it as-is via the existing hook interface
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/components/ui
All changes must be confined to frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx
nonGoals: Do not change the Step 1 form fields (Name, Mobile, BGMI ID)
Do not change the backend registration logic
Do not redesign the registration page UI
